description_long: This handcart features a rectangular wooden cargo bed with high side panels and a flat base, designed to carry loose or stacked items. The cart is supported by four large, spoked wooden wheels, each attached at the corners for stability. A long, straight handle extends from one end, allowing the cart to be pulled or pushed by hand. The interior of the cart is filled with irregularly shaped, tan-colored objects resembling parcels or packages. The wood is finished in a muted grayish-brown, giving the cart a utilitarian, rustic appearance. The overall construction suggests durability and functionality for transporting goods in urban or rural settings.
description: A sturdy wooden handcart with high side panels, four large spoked wheels, and a long straight handle, filled with tan parcels. The cart has a rustic, utilitarian look suitable for carrying goods.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the cart, the four spoked wheels, and the tan parcels inside.
description_view_1: Front angle view highlighting the straight handle extending outward and the open cargo area with visible parcels.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wheels and the side panels, with the handle partially visible.
description_view_3: Rear angle view focusing on the open cargo bed and the arrangement of tan parcels inside.
